* **IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-29 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements |

 
This library defines encounter-based elements for Cholera used throughout the Immunization CPG
